Safe Material： This tea strainer fine mesh is made of high quality 304 stainless steel, corrosion and rust resistant, with a smooth and easy to clean surface, ensuring safe and hygienic long-term use.

Unique Design: The tea strainer fine mesh is equipped with a long handle design, which is easy to hold to avoid scalding, and can be comfortably held for long time use. With the long handle design and shelf hook, it can be well placed on the edge of a regular cup, whether pouring hot water or removing the tea drain, it can be easily operated。

Long Handle & Fine Mesh: The precise design of the tea strainer fine mesh and the fine lace filter holes can effectively filter tea and coffee grounds to ensure the pure and smooth taste of your drinks, allowing you to enjoy the delicious taste of every cup of tea or coffee, ideal for making tea and coffee filtration.

Easy To Clean: For the stainless steel construction, this tea sieve is easy to clean after use. The filter surface is polished and burr-free, so you won't scratch your hands when cleaning. Simply give it a quick rinse under tap water or put it in the dishwasher.

For Various Scenes: This mini strainer can be used for baking, cooking, filtering and sifting. For filtering tea, coffee or sifting through sugar and spices for a variety of scenarios at home, office, tea house and more.This tea funnel will meet your needs.
